title: YTP: Sus and Sus [Re-poop]
description:
This is a repoop of Ultracslewisjr's first YTP, "Sus and Me," a Windows Movie Maker masterpiece that is unfortunately no longer on YouTube for copyright reasons. It is also very possible that no one has ever seen it. In this version of the classic, a talking dummy named CaeaC and a ve-ventriloquist named Dilkhead duke it out over who can make more sense. 

FAQ:

1) Q. Are you alive? A. Yes
2) Q. What is the source? A. "Caesar and Me," an episode from Season 5 of the Twilight Zone
3) Q. What did you make this bullshit with? A. Sony Vegas 12.0 Pro
4) Q. What's going on dude? A. I graduated college with an engineering degree, and soon to start a life in the field
5) Q. What about Spingebill? A. I have a great desire to edit another SB YTP, but have other videos coming out first. I'm trying to finish old projects that I've already started also have other collabs in the works. 
6) Q. Are you releasing any other YTPs soon? A. Hopefully yes. Two collabs in the works and one Monster YTP that's nearly complete.
